ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code for the state (e.g., 1 for Alabama) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (people per square mile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes_of_death" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause of death */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause of death (e.g., Assault by hanging, strangulation and suffocation) */,
  "cause_code" TEXT /* Code for the cause of death (e.g., X91) */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cause of death */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD-10 code for the cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the mortality data belongs to */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause of death */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to the cause */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "crude_rate" REAL /* Crude mortality rate (deaths per 100,000 population) */,
  "age_adjusted_rate" REAL /* Age-adjusted mortality rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes_of_death ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the demographic data belongs to */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-14, 15-24) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state for the demographic group */,
  "population_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of the population for the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for which mortality data is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause of death */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate for the cause and year */,
  "lower_confidence_limit" REAL /* Lower confidence limit for the mortality rate */,
  "upper_confidence_limit" REAL /* Upper confidence limit for the mortality rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_trends_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes_of_death ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mortality data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Whether data was downloaded or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mortality_id FOREIGN KEY ("mortality_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("mortality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., map, chart, graph) */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Actual visualization data (e.g., image, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
